title: ありがとうを言いたくて……！

text_block_list.text: I'm walking along the beach, when...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad we got some yakisoba dogs from that
beach hut!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, the owner said it's his most prized recipe.
We should eat up before they go cold.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: His most prized recipe?! Okay, let's dig i—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Aaahhh!

A bird—a black kite—suddenly swoops down and
steals the yakisoba dog from Nishino Flower's
hands!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh no. Well, I guess you can't argue with Mother
Nature.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Buuut at least it didn't carry you away. Here, you
can have mine.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What?! A-are you sure you don't mind?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep, go ahead. My horoscope said I should
stay away from red ginger today anyhow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You'll actually be doing me a favor by eating it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, thank you...

The next day at the academy, I run into Nishino
Flower glancing this way and that as if searching
for someone.
choice_data_list: Are you trying to find someone?
Are you trying to find someone?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... Actually, I'm looking for Sky.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There's something I wanted to give her, but I
don't know where she could be.

I ask if she's tried looking near the forest where
they ran into each other previously.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh—no, I haven't! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But where near the forest... I guess I'll just have to look!

I offer to join Nishino Flower in her search for
Seiun Sky, and she accepts.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, this is the last likely spot where she'd come
to nap, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah—Sky?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Mmm... Did... did someone just call my name?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh... Flower? How come you're out of breath?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff... Um, I have a present for you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: A present? What for?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Sky, you always behave as if nothing's a big
deal...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But you gave me your yakisoba dog at the beach,
and before that, you helped me find the stuff I'd
lost...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and there was that time you got that scary
centipede out of the flowerbed for me too,
remember?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, did I? You youngsters have such impressive
memories.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's why today, I really wanted to show
you how much I appreciate all of it!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's a flower crown. I wanted to give it to you
while the buds are in full bloom.
choice_data_list:
You really worked hard to get that crown to
her.
A flower crown of gratitude. How sweet.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yep! I was running all over the place!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa, that's why you were out of breath?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Since you showed up in such a rush, I figured you
found out I was ditching class and came to drag
me back.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? You mean you're here playing hooky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Whoops. Me and my big mouth.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: S-Sky! Geez... What am I going to do with you?

Seiun Sky puts the flower crown on her head, and
Nishino Flower escorts her back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! I'm really happy with how it turned
out!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks again, Sky, for everything you've done for
me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha. You're overthinking all this. Not that I
mind, though.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Even if I am overthinking it... I was really happy
when you helped me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...It was nothing. Really.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, Sky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm? N-nothing. Anyhoo...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the crown. And since you came all
the way here, how's about relaxin' a little?

The sunlight shines gently through the trees as
Seiun Sky and Nishino Flower relax for a while.
